summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Timeline Visualizer webapp completed. 14 out of 15 features tested successfully with excellent functionality across timeline rendering, theme switching, event interactions, zoom controls, and data switching.

ui_bugs.issue: Add Event form does not trigger when clicking on empty timeline space

passed_tests: Timeline loads Ages of Eldoria data with 11 event markers
Theme toggle switches between Fantasy and Sci-Fi themes perfectly
Timeline picker switches between Ages of Eldoria and Galactic Chronicles
Event markers are clickable and expand event cards with all details
Event card close functionality works via X button
War of Crowns period bar expands sub-timeline with 3 sub-events
Sub-timeline shows proper timeline axis, year markers, and clickable sub-events
Undated events (Dragon Pact, Starfall Prophecy) display fuzzy markers correctly
Zoom controls work: zoom in (130%), zoom out (77%), reset (100%)
Year markers display correct BCE/CE format (3000 BCE, 2800 BCE, etc.)
Horizontal scrolling works properly left and right
All UI control elements present and functional
No JavaScript errors or console issues found
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Add Event form triggering - the click handler for opening the Add Event form when clicking empty timeline space is not working properly. All form components exist with correct data-testids, but the click detection/coordinate logic needs adjustment.
